_comment: action: 'deny' hard-blocks the write (security-grade); 'warn' surfaces a non-blocking systemMessage and lets the write proceed under normal permissions (style/testability). Absent action defaults to 'deny'.

patterns.name: UNSAFE_INNERHTML_ASSIGNMENT
patterns.description: Direct .innerHTML = assignment bypasses Angular's XSS sanitisation
patterns.message: Bind with Angular's [innerHTML] (auto-sanitised) or render via textContent/interpolation. Do NOT reach for DomSanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustHtml() — that reintroduces the XSS sink.

patterns.name: SQL_STRING_CONCATENATION
patterns.description: SQL query built by string concatenation with a variable opens SQL-injection surface
patterns.message: Use parameterized queries: EF Core, Dapper, or SqlCommand.Parameters

patterns.name: SQL_STRING_INTERPOLATION
patterns.description: Interpolated SQL string — a sink unless routed through a parameterizing API
patterns.message: Interpolated SQL detected. Safe ONLY via EF Core FromSqlInterpolated/ExecuteSqlInterpolated (holes become parameters). If this is FromSqlRaw/ExecuteSqlRaw or assigned into raw command text, it is a SQL-injection sink — parameterize it. Advisory — not blocked.

patterns.name: DATETIME_NOW_INSTEAD_OF_TIMEPROVIDER
patterns.description: DateTime.Now is non-deterministic and untestable; dotnet>=8 ships TimeProvider
patterns.message: Prefer injecting TimeProvider (Microsoft.Extensions.Time.Testing) over DateTime.Now for testability. Advisory — not blocked.

patterns.name: AZURE_PUBLIC_BLOB_ACCESS
patterns.description: Public blob access exposes storage data without authentication — ASB-NS-1 P0
patterns.message: Set allowBlobPublicAccess: false. Use managed identity or SAS tokens for client access. (azure-security-baseline ASB-NS-1)

patterns.name: AZURE_PUBLIC_CONTAINER_ACCESS
patterns.description: Container-level public access allows anonymous blob read — ASB-NS-1 P0
patterns.message: Set publicAccess: 'None'. Use RBAC or SAS tokens instead of anonymous access. (azure-security-baseline ASB-NS-1)

patterns.name: AZURE_STORAGE_KEY_IN_OUTPUT
patterns.description: Exporting storage account key in outputs leaks credentials — ASB-IM-1 P0
patterns.message: Use managed identity instead of account keys. Remove listKeys() from outputs. (azure-security-baseline ASB-IM-1)
